title: cousinia sefidiana
intro: Cousinia sefidiana, also known as Sefid Cousinia, is a flowering plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). Traditionally used in Iranian folk medicine, it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, alleviating pain, and potentially lowering blood pressure. Cousinia sefidiana is used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, and is often consumed as a tea to harness its medicinal properties.
